profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Specificity is the opposite of generic—it's the detail that makes people feel personally witnessed.
profile.working_on: animating the millisecond of doubt that flickers across a character's face before they lie to themselves

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to illuminate the fragile moments of self-deception, revealing the profound depth of human experience through nuanced detail.
